calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Obtain Non-Court Supervised Bond; And To Modify The Second Trust Amendment To Correct The Scrivener Error
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Scott Hodges (Temporary Trustee).
William Logan for Naomi White (Beneficiary).

The Court stated that it does not have a proposed order and questions why neither Attorney signed the settlement agreement. Mr. Siracusa stated that Mr. Logan drafted the settlement agreement, that he reviewed it, that Ms. Lofdahl reviewed it and that all parties agree to it. The Court granted the Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. and the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the orders). Both orders were provided by Mr. Siracusa.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement

Off Calendar Nov-26-2018 Continued To Dec-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee; To Obtain Non-Court Supervised Bond; And To Modify The Second Trust Amendment To Correct The Scrivener Error
Off Calendar Sep-24-2018 Continued To Nov-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Scott Hodges (Temporary Trustee) and specially appearing on behalf of Nancy Lofdahl.
William Logan for Naomi White (Beneficiary).

Mr. Schultz stated that the parties are close to settlement, but the surviving settlor died last week and that they are asking for 60-days to finish settlement. Mr. Logan clarified that Carl Anderson passed away, that Jeanette is still alive and that this probably does not change the beneficiaries for Trust-A. Mr. Logan also stated that now that everything is irrevocable there are two charitable beneficiaries, that the goal is to not affect their interests, that he thinks the Charities will be okay with 50/50, and that a significant issue remains on the 2010 amendments and what Carl intended to do. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee, etc. is continued to November 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
